texto: Uttering foul words, while there are the sweetest of words, is like going for the unripe fruits while there are a lot of ripe ones.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Thiruvalluvar: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. texto: There is a limit for everything. You can't just load tons and tons of peacock feathers in a cart considering it's light weight. If you do, it will damage the axle of the cart.
